description_long: This object represents a human jogger in mid-stride, with one leg extended forward and the other bent behind, suggesting dynamic motion. The figure has a visible head with short brown hair and is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and long pants, both appearing to be made of synthetic athletic material. The arms are positioned with one bent at the elbow and the other extended, contributing to the sense of running movement. The jogger is wearing running shoes with a distinct sole and a two-tone color scheme. The surface of the figure is smooth and slightly glossy, with realistic skin tones and clothing colors. No visible accessories such as watches or headwear are present.
description: A dynamic human jogger in mid-stride, wearing a fitted long-sleeve top, long pants, and running shoes, with short brown hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's face, chest, and the forward-extended leg, with arms in a running position.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended stride, bent rear leg, and the profile of the running shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the trailing leg, with the back of the shoes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the outstretched arm and the forward leg, with the jogger's profile and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted long-sleeve athletic top and long fitted running pants, likely made of synthetic moisture-wicking fabric.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a thick, cushioned sole and a two-tone color scheme, likely designed for impact absorption.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger is depicted in a dynamic running posture with one leg extended forward, the other bent behind, torso upright, and arms in a natural running swing.
